{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113470178765769A25516E10723"}"},"total":3291},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7412270952276542270","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"追评1，太搞了哈哈哈[笑哭]，这书的气运之子是真的惨，太好玩了，而且不是无脑和主角对抗，那个世界级气运之子真给我整笑了
追评2，目前暂时看到130章，还是可以的，没有一些文那么老套，总体来说就是轻松爽文，目前没有什么大毒点"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725808187,"group_id":"7324993515467852862","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"462227873997325"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7324993515467852862","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"138"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":30749,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7411969824275202878","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的，爽且有脑，有气运之子这个设定，但是刚出现就被主角带人秒了[笑哭]，剧情偶尔还挺搞笑好玩的，没有什么太大的雷点，目前来说观感可以"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1725748285,"group_id":"7324993515467852862","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不和低能儿说话","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+pQ9NbYCN1lSyBnz4fK3aY=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1881733208444b9aa2c7e845c816a022~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618588&x-signature=%2FKtq%2FXCT%2Fq7aXUPDZEi76M2jf5M%3D","user_id":"462227873997325","user_name":"析洛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"462227873997325","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7324993515467852862","book_info":{"abstract":"谷梁渊穿越玄幻世界，成为一方圣地的师叔祖，虽然天赋平平，但辈分极高。
一朝觉醒授徒返还系统，只要传授徒弟神通宝物，就能千万倍返还。
但是这收徒要求有点奇葩，只能收天赋无双的舔狗为徒。
谷梁渊：天赋高的人很多，舔狗也有的是，可天赋无双的舔狗什么鬼？
幸好系统有探查功能，寻尽世间一切痴情之人。
“叮，收徒未来女帝，赐下忘情心经，触发万倍返还，返还奖励：太上忘情经！”
“叮，收徒仙子转世，赐下法相神通，触发万倍返还，返还奖励：法天象地！”
“叮，收徒未来鬼帝，赐下千年朱果，触发万倍返还，返还奖励：不死大药！”
……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/460d898f56ddff54a8c8cdcd1a2083f7","author":"龙秋源","author_id":"","book_id":"7324993515467852862","book_name":"收徒：师父别回头，徒儿真是师娘","book_short_name":"太上忘情道","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7325007395199926846","read_count":"55076","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1015618"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"464","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,女帝,架空,开局,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e083bca18f088bb41c720cdc404b9add~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256021&x-signature=kCMXiVhpR99R2Cwb0n6P0KGGCRU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"791283118380621","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"43"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113470178765769A25516E10723"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9400,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":48435},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7436775405119996697","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"书是好书，虽然我还没看完但还是先来提醒一下后来者，尽量就少看段评吧，看的人反正就是不舒服。
这本书主角的系统说白了就是收徒，赐宝返还，徒弟突破跟着突破。
然后评论里全是键盘诸葛，什么赐宝然后拿回来，什么把徒弟废了让他们反复重修[捂脸]全是各种馊主意，质疑主角这个质疑那个，说主角为什么不这样为什么不那样，书不好好看，这问问那问问。
我番茄看了近百本书了，这本书已经算是上上乘了。主角性格好，对外杀伐果断，对内宠徒狂魔。
感情线也很到位，徒弟也不是全女的，先吃桃子的还是圣主。其余主要角色塑造也个选鲜明。","text_exts":[{"e":201,"s":197,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407202116E10723%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227436775405119996697%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227324993515467852862%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731512168,"group_id":"7324993515467852862","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz/SnOysCDxMI7tXAfMkRaY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5cd4b7cf488e43dc9550b2a73e0dd26d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616348&x-signature=6c%2FILbf2HO4JmpcleZYRoPx06%2BM%3D","user_id":"703321905325143","user_name":"惠理子大人的狗"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"703321905325143","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7324993515467852862","book_info":{"abstract":"谷梁渊穿越玄幻世界，成为一方圣地的师叔祖，虽然天赋平平，但辈分极高。
